data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for syncing back to the main booking system.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Sync back to main booking system', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The prior steps focus on customer sign-ups, bookings, and other interactions, but none specifically address the synchronization back to the main booking system. This indicates a gap in the necessary functionality to fulfill the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of sync back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
